# Flag Maker -- Copilot Instructions

All shared project knowledge lives in `AGENTS.md` at the repository root. Read that
file for architecture, commands, code style, testing, and deployment details.

## Reference Docs

Read these files when the task requires deeper guidance:

- `docs/architecture.md` -- data-driven architecture rules, module responsibilities,
  and procedures for adding new flag elements. Read when working on `src/**` files.
- `docs/code-review.md` -- code review checklist and audit workflow. Read when
  reviewing or auditing changes.
- `docs/ui-style-guide.md` -- colors, spacing, z-index, responsive behavior, and
  interaction constraints. Read before modifying any UI element.
